name: Cameco Corporation
content: Cameco Corporation is one of the world’s largest global providers of the uranium fuel needed to energize a clean-air world. Based in Saskatoon, Saskatchewan, the company maintains a significant presence in the nuclear fuel cycle, including uranium mining, milling, refining, conversion, and fuel manufacturing. Cameco operates high-grade mines in Canada and Kazakhstan and provides fuel services to nuclear power plants worldwide. Through its ownership in Westinghouse Electric Company, it also provides nuclear plant technologies, products, and services, supporting the global transition to carbon-free energy.
